CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id Int32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])), (2, bitmapBuild([])), (3, bitmapBuild([10, 20, 30]));
SELECT bitmapMax(bitmap_col) AS max_bitmap FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT id, bitmapMax(bitmap_col) AS max_value FROM test_bitmap GROUP BY id;
SELECT t.id, bitmapMax(t.bitmap_col) AS max_value FROM (SELECT id, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]) AS bitmap_col FROM test_bitmap) AS t GROUP BY t.id;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT tj.id, bitmapMax(tj.bitmap_col) AS max_bitmap, tb.max_bitmap FROM test_join AS tj JOIN (SELECT bitmapMax(bitmap_col) AS max_bitmap FROM test_bitmap) AS tb ON tj.id = tb.max_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapMax(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])) AS max_value WHERE bitmapMax(bitmap_build([])) = 0;
WITH bitmapBuild([10, 20, 30]) AS bm SELECT bitmapMax(bm) AS max_bm;
